jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.
freshAuditPolicy.completionAuditDetail: When the current checklist is completed, run a broad detailed audit like the 2026-05-30 manual review: backend/API, frontend/UI, permissions, production behavior, performance/data scale, tests, deployment, logs, navigation, accessibility, and real user journeys; update remediation-backlog.md before continuing.

lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws restarted active; /api/status healthy; /preferences 307; / 307; /login 200; /api/preferences 401 without 500; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: P1 preference fields real app-side effects from fresh-audit findings
lastRun.summary: Preferences now filter stale no-op fields, normalize saved preference JSON through a shared helper, consume defaultPage during login when there is no explicit next target, and consume dashboardWidgets on the dashboard so saved/local preferences hide or show real dashboard sections.
validation: git status and overlap process check completed; continued existing dirty preference batch instead of starting a new topic

npx vitest run src/app/api/preferences/__tests__/route.test.ts src/app/preferences/__tests__/page.test.tsx src/app/__tests__/dashboard-preference-client.test.tsx src/app/api/login/__tests__/route.test.ts src/app/login/__tests__/actions.test.ts passed 13/13
npm run lint passed with existing react-hooks/set-state-in-effect warnings
production services vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service restarted and active
recent production logs checked; no new error/warn entries
lastRun.deployment: Restarted vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service successfully; smoke test passed.
lastRun.nextTarget: Continue remaining fresh-audit P1 items, starting with background long-running storage sync/import progress/timeout/cancel UX or storage/file permission UI gating.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
